hero.subtitle: Guesthouse — Restaurant
hero.description: Discover an oasis of peace and luxury in the heart of Žitný ostrov. Villa Potoň combines elegance with nature for an unforgettable experience.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.description: We are a modern pension with restaurant, located in Horná Potôň, 35km from Bratislava, 10km from Dunajská Streda. Our goal is to provide quality services so you will leave satisfied and happy.

events.title: Host Your Banquet, Wedding or Celebration
events.description: Villa Potoň is the ideal venue for your wedding, corporate event, or family celebration. We offer complete service from planning to execution.
